mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, plan_code, plan_name, duration_days, price_amount, currency_code, status, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM vip_plan WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vip_plan ( tenant_id, plan_code, plan_name, duration_days, price_amount, currency_code, status ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{planCode}, #{planName}, #{durationDays}, #{priceAmount}, #{currencyCode}, #{status} )
